attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, use Config tool.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (triggers) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/triggers.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- canvas-dev-tools: This skill provides Canvas LMS development utilities for testing LTI applications. It should be used when users need to create mock students with SIS IDs, accept course invitations in bulk, manage test enrollments, or perform other Canvas development tasks. All operations execute inline Ruby code via docker compose.
- dart-financial-analysis: This skill provides tools for analyzing South Korean corporate financial data from DART (Data Analysis, Retrieval and Transfer System). This skill should be used when users ask about Korean company financials, disclosures, business information, or want to compare financial metrics of Korean listed companies (KOSPI/KOSDAQ).
- template-skill: Replace with description of the skill and when Claude should use it.
- fedify-activitypub: Guide for building and maintaining ActivityPub/fediverse applications using Fedify. This skill should be used when users want to create federated social applications, implement ActivityPub protocols, build new features, test and debug federation, deploy to production, look up FEPs, or maintain existing Fedify applications.
- skill-share: A skill that creates new Claude skills and automatically shares them on Slack using Rube for seamless team collaboration and skill discovery.
- agent-creator: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create an agent", "write a subagent", "generate agent definition", "add agent to plugin", "write agent frontmatter", "create autonomous agent", "build subagent", needs agent structure guidance, YAML frontmatter configuration, invocation criteria with examples, or wants to add specialized subagents to Claude Code plugins with proper capabilities lists and tool access definitions.
- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.
- lsp-config: This skill should be used when the user wants to view, add, remove, or modify language server configurations in `.lsp.json`. It should be used when the user mentions `.lsp.json`, LSP config, language server setup, or wants to configure type-checking/linting tools for their project.
- obsidian:defuddle: Extract clean markdown content from web pages using Defuddle CLI, removing clutter and navigation to save tokens. Use instead of WebFetch when the user provides a URL to read or analyze, for online documentation, articles, blog posts, or any standard web page.
- obsidian:json-canvas: Create and edit JSON Canvas files (.canvas) with nodes, edges, groups, and connections. Use when working with .canvas files, creating visual canvases, mind maps, flowcharts, or when the user mentions Canvas files in Obsidian.
- obsidian:obsidian-cli: Interact with Obsidian vaults using the Obsidian CLI to read, create, search, and manage notes, tasks, properties, and more. Also supports plugin and theme development with commands to reload plugins, run JavaScript, capture errors, take screenshots, and inspect the DOM. Use when the user asks to interact with their Obsidian vault, manage notes, search vault content, perform vault operations from the command line, or develop and debug Obsidian plugins and themes.
- obsidian:obsidian-bases: Create and edit Obsidian Bases (.base files) with views, filters, formulas, and summaries. Use when working with .base files, creating database-like views of notes, or when the user mentions Bases, table views, card views, filters, or formulas in Obsidian.
- obsidian:obsidian-markdown: Create and edit Obsidian Flavored Markdown with wikilinks, embeds, callouts, properties, and other Obsidian-specific syntax. Use when working with .md files in Obsidian, or when the user mentions wikilinks, callouts, frontmatter, tags, embeds, or Obsidian notes.
- minimalism-workflow:store-release-note: Generate concise App Store / Play Store release notes from the latest GitHub release. This skill should be used when the user wants to write app store release notes, play store changelog, or compress release notes for mobile store submission.
- minimalism-workflow:gh-release-note: Generate a release changelog from git commits between the previous tag and HEAD, then create a GitHub release. This skill should be used when the user wants to write release notes, generate a changelog, create a GitHub release, or summarize what changed since the last release.
- minimalism-workflow:ghpr: Create a GitHub pull request with auto-generated title and body from commits. Use when the user wants to create a PR, open a pull request, or says "ghpr".
- minimalism-workflow:gh-issue-filer: This skill should be used when the user wants to file a GitHub issue, create a bug report, request a feature, report a problem, or open an issue in the current repository. It explores the codebase to understand project context, gathers issue details through conversation, and files the issue via the gh CLI. Trigger phrases include "file an issue", "create an issue", "report a bug", "request a feature", "open an issue", or "gh issue".
- minimalism-workflow:cleanup-plans: Clean up saved plans from the planvault. This skill should be used when the user wants to delete old plans, remove stale specs, prune the planvault, or says "cleanup-plans".
- minimalism-workflow:save-plan: Save a plan or spec as markdown, associated with the current project directory. This skill should be used when the user wants to save a plan, persist a spec, store a design document, or says "save-plan".
- minimalism-workflow:release-tag: Create a git tag from the project's version file (package.json, Cargo.toml, pubspec.yaml, build.gradle, etc.). This skill should be used when the user wants to tag a release, create a version tag, or tag the current commit for release.
- minimalism-workflow:load-plan: Load a previously saved plan or spec for the current project directory. This skill should be used when the user wants to load a plan, recall a spec, review a saved design document, or says "load-plan".
- minimalism-workflow:commit: Create a git commit with auto-generated message from staged changes. Use when the user wants to commit, create a commit, or says "commit".
- minimalism-workflow:list-plans: List all saved plans from the planvault, optionally filtered by the current project. This skill should be used when the user wants to see available plans, browse saved specs, or says "list-plans".
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

input.prompt:
I'm working in an Android Jetpack Compose app for Hackers Pub (a fediverse client). I need to find the reply composition flow. Specifically, I need to understand:

1. Where a reply is composed and submitted (likely a composer screen/bottom sheet)
2. After reply succeeds, what happens — does it navigate back? Is there any state update on the parent screen (timeline or post/article detail)?
3. Where the Timeline screen (feed) lives and how its list is populated/refreshed
4. Where the Post detail screen and Article detail screen live, and how their replies section is populated

Report with file paths and line numbers:
- The reply composer screen/component
- The reply submission callback (what happens after server returns success)
- The timeline screen and how it handles refresh/scroll-to-top
- The post detail screen and its replies list
- The article detail screen and its replies list (if different from post detail)

Use thorough exploration. This is a Kotlin/Compose app in /Users/kodingwarrior/fediverse/hackerspub-android-worktrees/fix-optimistic-reply-append. The branch is `fix/optimistic-reply-append` so there may already be some in-progress work — check git diff main...HEAD if needed.

Report in under 400 words.

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have a complete understanding. Let me compile the report with all findings.

## Reply Composition Flow - Summary Report

**Reply Composer Screen:**
- `/Users/kodingwarrior/fediverse/hackerspub-android-worktrees/fix-optimistic-reply-append/app/src/main/java/pub/hackers/android/ui/screens/compose/ComposeScreen.kt` (lines 88-458)
  - `ComposeScreen()` accepts `replyToId` parameter and displays reply target preview via `ReplyTargetSection()` (lines 213-216, 568-590)
  - Reply target is loaded in `ComposeViewModel.setReplyTarget()` and mention prefixes are auto-filled (lines 209-248)

**Reply Submission & Success Callback:**
- `ComposeViewModel.kt` (lines 286-311): `post()` method calls `repository.createNote()` with `replyTargetId` parameter
- Lines 152-156: `LaunchedEffect(uiState.isPosted)` invokes `onPostSuccess()` callback when post succeeds
- `/Users/kodingwarrior/fediverse/hackerspub-android-worktrees/fix-optimistic-reply-append/app/src/main/java/pub/hackers/android/ui/HackersPubApp.kt`: `onPostSuccess` callback calls `viewModel.timelineRefreshTrigger.requestRefresh()` and then `navController.popBackStack()` to navigate back

**Timeline Screen & Refresh:**
- `/Users/kodingwarrior/fediverse/hackerspub-android-worktrees/fix-optimistic-reply-append/app/src/main/java/pub/hackers/android/ui/screens/timeline/TimelineScreen.kt` (lines 58-100)
  - Uses `TimelineViewModel` which includes `TimelineRefreshTrigger` (line 41)
  - Lines 83-87: Listens to `refreshTrigger.refreshAt` and scrolls to item(0) when refresh triggered
  - Lines 91-99: Tab re-tap logic — refresh if at top, else scroll to top

**Post Detail & Replies List:**
- `/Users/kodingwarrior/fediverse/hackerspub-android-worktrees/fix-optimistic-reply-append/app/src/main/java/pub/hackers/android/ui/screens/postdetail/PostDetailScreen.kt` (lines 122-131)
  - `PostDetailViewModel.kt` (lines 66-70): Replies are loaded via paginated `Flow<PagingData<Post>>` using `repository.postRepliesPage(postId, after)`
  - Line 352: `replies = viewModel.replies.collectAsLazyPagingItems()` populates the replies list

**Article Detail:**
- Articles and posts share the same `PostDetailScreen` (lines 299-300 check `typename == "Article"` for display purposes)
- Both article and post replies use the identical paginated replies system

60	
61	sealed class Screen(
62	    val route: String,
63	    val titleResId: Int,
64	    val selectedIcon: ImageVector,
65	    val unselectedIcon: ImageVector,
66	    val requiresAuth: Boolean = false
67	) {
68	    data object Timeline : Screen(
69	        "timeline",
70	        R.string.nav_timeline,
71	        Icons.Filled.Home,
72	        Icons.Outlined.Home,
73	        requiresAuth = true
74	    )
75	    data object Notifications : Screen(
76	        "notifications",
77	        R.string.nav_notifications,
78	        Icons.Filled.Notifications,
79	        Icons.Outlined.Notifications,
80	        requiresAuth = true
81	    )
82	    data object Explore : Screen(
83	        "explore",
84	        R.string.nav_explore,
85	        Icons.Filled.Explore,
86	        Icons.Outlined.Explore
87	    )
88	    data object Search : Screen(
89	        "search?initialQuery={initialQuery}",
90	        R.string.nav_search,
91	        Icons.Filled.Search,
92	        Icons.Outlined.Search
93	    ) {
94	        val baseRoute = "search"
95	        fun createRoute(initialQuery: String? = null): String {
96	            return if (initialQuery != null) {
97	                val encoded = android.net.Uri.encode(initialQuery)
98	                "search?initialQuery=$encoded"
99	            } else "search"
100	        }
101	    }
102	    data object Settings : Screen(
103	        "settings",
104	        R.string.nav_settings,
105	        Icons.Filled.Settings,
106	        Icons.Outlined.Settings
107	    )
108	}
109	
110	sealed class DetailScreen(val route: String) {
111	    data object SignIn : DetailScreen("signin?token={token}&code={code}") {
112	        fun createRoute(token: String? = null, code: String? = null): String {
113	            val params = mutableListOf<String>()
114	            if (token != null) params.add("token=$token")
115	            if (code != null) params.add("code=$code")
116	            return if (params.isEmpty()) "signin" else "signin?${params.joinToString("&")}"
117	        }
118	    }
119	    data object Compose : DetailScreen("compose?replyTo={replyTo}&quoteOf={quoteOf}") {
120	        fun createRoute(replyTo: String? = null, quoteOf: String? = null): String {
121	            val params = mutableListOf<String>()
122	            if (replyTo != null) params.add("replyTo=$replyTo")
123	            if (quoteOf != null) params.add("quoteOf=$quoteOf")
124	            return if (params.isEmpty()) "compose" else "compose?${params.joinToString("&")}"
125	        }
126	    }
127	    data object PostDetail : DetailScreen("post/{postId}") {
128	        fun createRoute(postId: String) = "post/$postId"
129	    }
130	    data object Profile : DetailScreen("profile/{handle}") {
131	        fun createRoute(handle: String) = "profile/$handle"
132	    }
133	    data object PostByUrl : DetailScreen("post-by-url?url={url}") {
134	        fun createRoute(url: String): String {
135	            val encoded = android.net.Uri.encode(url)
136	            return "post-by-url?url=$encoded"
137	        }
138	    }
139	    data object RecommendedActors : DetailScreen("recommended-actors")
140	    data object ComposeArticle : DetailScreen("compose-article?draftId={draftId}") {
141	        fun createRoute(draftId: String? = null): String {
142	            return if (draftId != null) "compose-article?draftId=$draftId" else "compose-article"
143	        }
144	    }
145	    data object Drafts : DetailScreen("drafts")
146	    data object EditProfile : DetailScreen("edit-profile")
147	    data object WebView : DetailScreen("webview?url={url}") {
148	        fun createRoute(url: String): String {
149	            val encoded = android.net.Uri.encode(url)
150	            return "webview?url=$encoded"
151	        }
152	    }
153	}

155	@Composable
156	fun HackersPubApp(
157	    deepLinkData: pub.hackers.android.DeepLinkData? = null,
158	    navigationIntent: pub.hackers.android.NavigationIntent? = null,
159	    onDeepLinkConsumed: () -> Unit = {},
160	    onNavigationIntentConsumed: () -> Unit = {},
161	    viewModel: AppViewModel = hiltViewModel()
162	) {
163	    val navController = rememberNavController()
164	    val isLoggedInState by viewModel.isLoggedIn.collectAsState(initial = null as Boolean?)
165	
166	    val fontSizePercent by viewModel.preferencesManager.fontSizePercent.collectAsState(initial = 100)
167	    val hasUnread by viewModel.hasUnread.collectAsState()
168	
169	    // Wait for auth state to resolve from DataStore before rendering navigation.
170	    // This prevents NavHost graph recreation when isLoggedIn transitions from the
171	    // initial value to the actual value, which would reset the back stack.
172	    if (isLoggedInState == null) return
173	    val isLoggedIn = isLoggedInState!!
174	
175	    // Pin startDestination so it never changes after first resolution.
176	    // Login/logout transitions are handled imperatively with popUpTo(0).
177	    val startDestination = remember {
178	        if (isLoggedIn) Screen.Timeline.route else Screen.Explore.route
179	    }
180	
181	    // Handle deep link for verification
182	    LaunchedEffect(deepLinkData) {
183	        deepLinkData?.let {
184	            navController.navigate("signin?token=${it.token}&code=${it.code}")
185	            onDeepLinkConsumed()
186	        }
187	    }
188	
189	    // Handle navigation intent from system notifications or deep links.
190	    // Uses the same options as bottom-nav onItemSelected so that back-stack
191	    // save/restore markers line up; otherwise Timeline (=startDestination)
192	    // gets stuck in a no-op state on the first bottom-nav tap after arriving
193	    // here from a system notification.
194	    LaunchedEffect(navigationIntent) {
195	        navigationIntent?.let {
196	            navController.navigate(it.route) {
197	                popUpTo(navController.graph.findStartDestination().id) {
198	                    saveState = true
199	                }
200	                launchSingleTop = true
201	                restoreState = true
202	            }
203	            onNavigationIntentConsumed()
204	        }
205	    }
206	
207	    // Enqueue notification polling when user logs in
208	    LaunchedEffect(isLoggedIn) {
209	        if (isLoggedIn) {
210	            viewModel.enqueueNotificationPolling()
211	            viewModel.startForegroundPolling()
212	        } else {
213	            viewModel.stopForegroundPolling()
214	        }
215	    }
216	
217	    // Start/stop foreground polling based on app lifecycle
218	    val lifecycleOwner = LocalLifecycleOwner.current
219	    DisposableEffect(lifecycleOwner, isLoggedIn) {
220	        val observer = LifecycleEventObserver { _, event ->
221	            if (!isLoggedIn) return@LifecycleEventObserver
222	            when (event) {
223	                Lifecycle.Event.ON_START -> viewModel.startForegroundPolling()
224	                Lifecycle.Event.ON_STOP -> viewModel.stopForegroundPolling()
225	                else -> {}
226	            }
227	        }
228	        lifecycleOwner.lifecycle.addObserver(observer)
229	        onDispose {
230	            lifecycleOwner.lifecycle.removeObserver(observer)
231	        }
232	    }
233	
234	    ProvideInAppBrowserUriHandler(
235	        preferencesManager = viewModel.preferencesManager,
236	        onInternalNavigate = { route ->
237	            navController.navigate(route) { launchSingleTop = true }
238	        }
239	    ) {
240	    CompositionLocalProvider(LocalFontScale provides (fontSizePercent / 100f)) {
241	
242	    val bottomNavItems = if (isLoggedIn) {
243	        listOf(
244	            BottomNavItem(
245	                route = Screen.Timeline.route,
246	                label = stringResource(R.string.nav_timeline),
247	                icon = Icons.Outlined.Home,
248	                selectedIcon = Icons.Filled.Home,
249	            ),
250	            BottomNavItem(
251	                route = Screen.Explore.route,
252	                label = stringResource(R.string.nav_explore),
253	                icon = Icons.Outlined.Explore,
254	                selectedIcon = Icons.Filled.Explore,
255	            ),
256	            BottomNavItem(
257	                route = Screen.Notifications.route,
258	                label = stringResource(R.string.nav_notifications),
259	                icon = Icons.Outlined.Notifications,
260	                selectedIcon = Icons.Filled.Notifications,
261	                hasNotificationDot = hasUnread,
262	            ),
263	            BottomNavItem(
264	                route = Screen.Search.baseRoute,
265	                label = stringResource(R.string.nav_search),
266	                icon = Icons.Outlined.Search,
267	                selectedIcon = Icons.Filled.Search,
268	            ),
269	        )
270	    } else {
271	        listOf(
272	            BottomNavItem(
273	                route = Screen.Explore.route,
274	                label = stringResource(R.string.nav_explore),
275	                icon = Icons.Outlined.Explore,
276	                selectedIcon = Icons.Filled.Explore,
277	            ),
278	            BottomNavItem(
279	                route = Screen.Search.baseRoute,
280	                label = stringResource(R.string.nav_search),
281	                icon = Icons.Outlined.Search,
282	                selectedIcon = Icons.Filled.Search,
283	            ),
284	            BottomNavItem(
285	                route = Screen.Settings.route,
286	                label = stringResource(R.string.nav_settings),
287	                icon = Icons.Outlined.Settings,
288	                selectedIcon = Icons.Filled.Settings,
289	            ),
290	        )
291	    }
292	
293	    val navBackStackEntry by navController.currentBackStackEntryAsState()
294	    val currentDestination = navBackStackEntry?.destination
295	    val currentRoute = currentDestination?.route
296	    val currentBaseRoute = currentRoute?.substringBefore('?')
297	    val showBottomBar = bottomNavItems.any { it.route == currentBaseRoute }
298	
299	    Scaffold(
300	        bottomBar = {
301	            if (showBottomBar) {
302	                BottomNavBar(
303	                    items = bottomNavItems,
304	                    selectedRoute = currentBaseRoute ?: "",
305	                    onItemSelected = { item ->
306	                        if (item.route == (currentBaseRoute ?: "")) {
307	                            // Re-tap on current tab: signal scroll-to-top / refresh
308	                            navController.currentBackStackEntry
309	                                ?.savedStateHandle
310	                                ?.set("tabRetapped", System.currentTimeMillis())
311	                        } else {
312	                            navController.navigate(item.route) {
313	                                popUpTo(navController.graph.findStartDestination().id) {
314	                                    saveState = true
315	                                }
316	                                launchSingleTop = true
317	                                restoreState = true
318	                            }
319	                        }
320	                    },
321	                )
322	            }
323	        }
324	    ) { innerPadding ->
325	        NavHost(
326	            navController = navController,
327	            startDestination = startDestination,
328	            modifier = Modifier
329	                .padding(innerPadding)
330	                .consumeWindowInsets(innerPadding)
331	        ) {
332	            composable(Screen.Timeline.route) { backStackEntry ->
333	                val tabRetapped by backStackEntry.savedStateHandle
334	                    .getStateFlow<Long>("tabRetapped", 0L)

336	                TimelineScreen(

343	                    },

346	                    },

349	                    },
350	                    onSettingsClick = {

352	                    },
353	                    onRecommendedActorsClick = {

355	                    },
356	                    onComposeArticleClick = {

358	                    },
359	                    onComposeArticleLongClick = {

361	                    }
362	                )
363	            }
364	
365	            composable(Screen.Notifications.route) {
366	                NotificationsScreen(
367	                    onPostClick = { postId ->
368	                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
369	                    },
370	                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
371	                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
372	                    }
373	                )
374	            }
375	
376	            composable(Screen.Explore.route) {
377	                ExploreScreen(
378	                    onPostClick = { postId ->
379	                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
380	                    },
381	                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
382	                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
383	                    },
384	                    onReplyClick = { postId ->
385	                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(postId))

88	fun ComposeScreen(
89	    replyToId: String?,
90	    quotedPostId: String? = null,
91	    onPostSuccess: () -> Unit,
92	    onNavigateBack: () -> Unit,
93	    viewModel: ComposeViewModel = hiltViewModel()
94	) {
95	    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
96	    val snackbarHostState = remember { SnackbarHostState() }
97	    var showVisibilityMenu by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
98	
99	    val colors = LocalAppColors.current
100	    val typography = LocalAppTypography.current
101	
102	    // Track TextFieldValue for cursor position
103	    var textFieldValue by remember {
104	        mutableStateOf(TextFieldValue(text = uiState.content))
105	    }
106	
107	    // Track cursor and text field positions for popup placement
108	    var cursorRect by remember { mutableStateOf(Rect.Zero) }
109	    var textFieldBounds by remember { mutableStateOf(Rect.Zero) }
110	    var textLayoutResult by remember { mutableStateOf<TextLayoutResult?>(null) }
111	    val scrollState = rememberScrollState()
112	    val focusRequester = remember { FocusRequester() }
113	    val keyboardController = LocalSoftwareKeyboardController.current
114	    val density = LocalDensity.current
115	    val popupHeight = with(density) { 200.dp.toPx() } // Estimated popup height
116	    val coroutineScope = rememberCoroutineScope()
117	
118	    // Auto-scroll to keep cursor visible when text overflows
119	    LaunchedEffect(cursorRect) {
120	        if (cursorRect != Rect.Zero) {
121	            val cursorBottom = cursorRect.bottom.toInt()
122	            val cursorTop = cursorRect.top.toInt()
123	            val viewportTop = scrollState.value
124	            val viewportBottom = viewportTop + scrollState.viewportSize
125	
126	            if (cursorBottom > viewportBottom) {
127	                scrollState.animateScrollTo(cursorBottom - scrollState.viewportSize)
128	            } else if (cursorTop < viewportTop) {
129	                scrollState.animateScrollTo(cursorTop)
130	            }
131	        }
132	    }
133	
134	    // Sync TextFieldValue with ViewModel state changes (e.g., when mention is selected)
135	    LaunchedEffect(uiState.content, uiState.cursorPosition) {
136	        if (textFieldValue.text != uiState.content) {
137	            textFieldValue = textFieldValue.copy(
138	                text = uiState.content,
139	                selection = TextRange(uiState.cursorPosition)
140	            )
141	        }
142	    }
143	
144	    LaunchedEffect(replyToId) {
145	        replyToId?.let { viewModel.setReplyTarget(it) }
146	    }
147	
148	    LaunchedEffect(quotedPostId) {
149	        quotedPostId?.let { viewModel.setQuotedPost(it) }
150	    }
151	
152	    LaunchedEffect(uiState.isPosted) {
153	        if (uiState.isPosted) {
154	            onPostSuccess()
155	        }
156	    }
157	
158	    LaunchedEffect(uiState.error) {
159	        uiState.error?.let {
160	            snackbarHostState.showSnackbar(it)
161	            viewModel.clearError()
162	        }
163	    }
164	
165	    LaunchedEffect(Unit) {
166	        focusRequester.requestFocus()
167	    }
168	
169	    val postEnabled = uiState.content.isNotBlank() && !uiState.isPosting
170	
171	    Scaffold(
172	        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
173	        topBar = {
174	            Box(
175	                modifier = Modifier
176	                    .fillMaxWidth()
177	                    .padding(horizontal = 4.dp, vertical = 8.dp)
178	            ) {
179	                IconButton(
180	                    onClick = onNavigateBack,
181	                    modifier = Modifier.align(Alignment.CenterStart)
182	                ) {
183	                    Icon(
184	                        imageVector = Icons.Default.Close,
185	                        contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.cancel),
186	                        tint = colors.textPrimary
187	                    )
188	                }
189	                Text(
190	                    text = if (replyToId != null) stringResource(R.string.reply) else stringResource(
191	                        R.string.compose
192	                    ),
193	                    style = typography.titleLarge,
194	                    color = colors.textPrimary,
195	                    modifier = Modifier.align(Alignment.Center)
196	                )
197	            }
198	        },
199	        snackbarHost = { SnackbarHost(snackbarHostState) }
200	    ) { paddingValues ->
201	        Column(
202	            modifier = Modifier
203	                .fillMaxSize()
204	                .padding(paddingValues)
205	                .imePadding()
206	        ) {
207	            Column(
208	                modifier = Modifier
209	                    .weight(1f)
210	                    .padding(16.dp)
211	            ) {
212	                // Reply target preview
213	                ReplyTargetSection(
214	                    isLoading = uiState.isLoadingReplyTarget,
215	                    replyTargetPost = uiState.replyTargetPost,
216	                )
217	
218	                Box(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
219	                    // Custom text field with cursor position tracking
220	                    Surface(
221	                        modifier = Modifier
222	                            .fillMaxSize()
223	                            .onGloballyPositioned { coordinates ->
224	                                textFieldBounds = coordinates.boundsInWindow()
225	                            },
226	                        shape = RoundedCornerShape(4.dp),
227	                        color = colors.surface,
228	                        border = BorderStroke(1.dp, colors.divider)
229	                    ) {
230	                        Box(
231	                            modifier = Modifier
232	                                .fillMaxSize()
233	                                .clickable(
234	                                    interactionSource = remember { MutableInteractionSource() },
235	                                    indication = null
236	                                ) {
237	                                    focusRequester.requestFocus()
238	                                    keyboardController?.show()
239	                                }
240	                                .padding(16.dp)
241	                                .verticalScroll(scrollState)
242	                        ) {
243	                            BasicTextField(
244	                                value = textFieldValue,
245	                                onValueChange = { newValue: TextFieldValue ->
246	                                    textFieldValue = newValue
247	                                    viewModel.updateContent(
248	                                        content = newValue.text,
249	                                        cursorPosition = newValue.selection.start
250	                                    )
251	                                },
252	                                onTextLayout = { result: TextLayoutResult ->
253	                                    textLayoutResult = result
254	                                    // Update cursor position
255	                                    val cursorPos = textFieldValue.selection.start
256	                                        .coerceIn(0, textFieldValue.text.length)
257	                                    cursorRect =
258	                                        if (textFieldValue.text.isNotEmpty() || cursorPos == 0) {
259	                                            result.getCursorRect(cursorPos)
260	                                        } else {
261	                                            Rect.Zero
262	                                        }
263	                                },
264	                                modifier = Modifier
265	                                    .fillMaxWidth()
266	                                    .focusRequester(focusRequester),
267	                                enabled = !uiState.isPosting,
268	                                textStyle = typography.bodyLarge.copy(
269	                                    color = colors.textBody
270	                                ),
271	                                cursorBrush = SolidColor(colors.composeAccent),
272	                                decorationBox = { innerTextField ->
273	                                    Box {
274	                                        if (textFieldValue.text.isEmpty()) {
275	                                            Text(
276	                                                text = stringResource(R.string.compose_hint),
277	                                                style = typography.bodyLarge,
278	                                                color = colors.textSecondary
279	                                            )
280	                                        }
281	                                        innerTextField()
282	                                    }
283	                                }
284	                            )
285	                        }
286	                    }
287	
288	                    // Mention autocomplete popup
289	                    if (uiState.mentionSuggestions.isNotEmpty() || uiState.isLoadingMentions) {
290	                        // Calculate cursor position accounting for padding and scroll
291	                        val paddingPx = with(density) { 16.dp.toPx() }
292	                        val cursorYInBox = cursorRect.bottom - scrollState.value + paddingPx
293	                        val cursorXInBox = cursorRect.left + paddingPx
294	
295	                        // Clamp to visible area
296	                        val visibleCursorY =
297	                            cursorYInBox.coerceIn(paddingPx, textFieldBounds.height - paddingPx)
298	
299	                        Popup(
300	                            alignment = Alignment.TopStart,
301	                            offset = IntOffset(
302	                                x = cursorXInBox.roundToInt().coerceIn(
303	                                    0,
304	                                    (textFieldBounds.width - with(density) { 280.dp.toPx() }).toInt()
305	                                        .coerceAtLeast(0)
306	                                ),
307	                                y = (visibleCursorY + with(density) { 20.dp.toPx() }).roundToInt()
308	                            ),
309	                            properties = PopupProperties(focusable = false)
310	                        ) {
311	                            MentionAutocomplete(
312	                                suggestions = uiState.mentionSuggestions,
313	                                isLoading = uiState.isLoadingMentions,
314	                                onSuggestionSelected = { actor ->
315	                                    val (newContent, newCursor) = viewModel.selectMention(actor)
316	                                    textFieldValue = TextFieldValue(
317	                                        text = newContent,
318	                                        selection = TextRange(newCursor)
319	                                    )
320	                                },
321	                                modifier = Modifier.width(280.dp)
322	                            )
323	                        }
324	                    }
325	                }
326	
327	                // Quoted post preview
328	                QuotedPostSection(
329	                    isLoading = uiState.isLoadingQuotedPost,
330	                    quotedPost = uiState.quotedPost,
331	                )
332	            }
333	            // Close inner content Column
334	
335	            // Visibility toolbar pinned above keyboard
336	            HorizontalDivider(color = colors.divider)
337	            Row(
338	                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
339	                modifier = Modifier
340	                    .fillMaxWidth()
341	                    .padding(horizontal = 4.dp, vertical = 4.dp)
342	            ) {
343	                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
344

361	                            PostVisibility.UNLISTED -> stringResource(R.string.visibility_unlisted)
362	                            PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS -> stringResource(R.string.visibility_followers)
363	                            else -> stringResource(R.string.visibility_public)
364	                        },

566	@Composable
567	@androidx.annotation.VisibleForTesting
568	internal fun ColumnScope.ReplyTargetSection(
569	    isLoading: Boolean,
570	    replyTargetPost: Post?,
571	) {
572	    when {
573	        isLoading -> {
574	            CircularProgressIndicator(
575	                modifier = Modifier
576	                    .size(24.dp)
577	                    .align(Alignment.CenterHorizontally)
578	            )
579	            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
580	        }
581	
582	        replyTargetPost != null -> {
583	            ReplyTargetPreview(
584	                post = replyTargetPost,
585	                modifier = Modifier.alpha(0.6f)
586	            )
587	            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
588	        }
589	    }
590	}

592	@Composable
593	@androidx.annotation.VisibleForTesting
594	internal fun ColumnScope.QuotedPostSection(
595	    isLoading: Boolean,
596	    quotedPost: Post?,
597	) {
598	    when {
599	        isLoading -> {
600	            CircularProgressIndicator(
601	                modifier = Modifier
602	                    .size(24.dp)
603	                    .align(Alignment.CenterHorizontally)
604	            )
605	            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
606	        }
607	
608	        quotedPost != null -> {
609	            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
610	            QuotedPostPreview(post = quotedPost)
611	        }
612	    }
613	}

120	@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
121	@Composable
122	fun PostDetailScreen(
123	    postId: String,
124	    onNavigateBack: () -> Unit,
125	    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
126	    onReplyClick: (String) -> Unit,
127	    onQuoteClick: (String) -> Unit = {},
128	    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
129	    isLoggedIn: Boolean = true,
130	    viewModel: PostDetailViewModel = hiltViewModel()
131	) {
132	    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
133	    val context = LocalContext.current
134	    val colors = LocalAppColors.current
135	    val confirmBeforeDelete by viewModel.preferencesManager.confirmBeforeDelete.collectAsState(
136	        initial = true
137	    )
138	    val confirmBeforeShare by viewModel.preferencesManager.confirmBeforeShare.collectAsState(initial = false)
139	    var showDeleteConfirmation by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
140	    var showShareConfirmation by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
141	    var webViewUrl by remember { mutableStateOf<String?>(null) }
142	
143	    // Navigate back after successful deletion
144	    LaunchedEffect(uiState.isDeleted) {
145	        if (uiState.isDeleted) {
146	            onNavigateBack()
147	        }
148	    }
149	
150	    // WebView bottom sheet
151	    if (webViewUrl != null) {
152	        ModalBottomSheet(
153	            onDismissRequest = { webViewUrl = null },
154	            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
155	        ) {
156	            WebViewSheetContent(url = webViewUrl!!)
157	        }
158	    }
159	
160	    // Reaction picker bottom sheet
161	    if (uiState.showReactionPicker) {
162	        ModalBottomSheet(
163	            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.toggleReactionPicker() },
164	            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
165	        ) {
166	            ReactionPicker(
167	                reactionGroups = uiState.reactionGroups,
168	                isSubmitting = uiState.isReacting,
169	                onEmojiSelect = { viewModel.toggleReaction(it) },
170	                onClose = { viewModel.toggleReactionPicker() }
171	            )
172	        }
173	    }
174	
175	    // Shares bottom sheet
176	    if (uiState.showSharesSheet) {
177	        ModalBottomSheet(
178	            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissSharesSheet() },
179	            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
180	        ) {
181	            SharesSheet(
182	                actors = uiState.shareActors,
183	                isLoading = uiState.isLoadingShares,
184	                onProfileClick = { handle ->
185	                    viewModel.dismissSharesSheet()
186	                    onProfileClick(handle)
187	                },
188	                onClose = { viewModel.dismissSharesSheet() }
189	            )
190	        }
191	    }
192	
193	    // Reactors bottom sheet
194	    if (uiState.showReactorsSheet && uiState.reactionGroups.isNotEmpty()) {
195	        val initialIndex = uiState.selectedReactionGroup
196	            ?.let { selected -> uiState.reactionGroups.indexOf(selected).coerceAtLeast(0) }
197	            ?: 0
198	        ModalBottomSheet(
199	            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissReactorsSheet() },
200	            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
201	        ) {
202	            ReactorsSheet(
203	                groups = uiState.reactionGroups,
204	                initialIndex = initialIndex,
205	                onProfileClick = { handle ->
206	                    viewModel.dismissReactorsSheet()
207	                    onProfileClick(handle)
208	                }
209	            )
210	        }
211	    }
212	
213	    // Quotes bottom sheet
214	    if (uiState.showQuotesSheet) {
215	        ModalBottomSheet(
216	            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissQuotesSheet() },
217	            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
218	        ) {
219	            QuotesSheet(
220	                posts = uiState.quotePosts,
221	                isLoading = uiState.isLoadingQuotes,
222	                onPostClick = { id ->
223	                    viewModel.dismissQuotesSheet()
224	                    onPostClick(id)
225	                },
226	                onClose = { viewModel.dismissQuotesSheet() }
227	            )
228	        }
229	    }
230	
231	    if (showDeleteConfirmation) {
232	        AlertDialog(
233	            onDismissRequest = { showDeleteConfirmation = false },
234	            title = { Text(stringResource(R.string.delete_post_confirm_title)) },
235	            text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.delete_post_confirm)) },
236	            confirmButton = {
237	                TextButton(
238	                    onClick = {
239	                        showDeleteConfirmation = false
240	                        viewModel.deletePost()
241	                    }
242	                ) {
243	                    Text(
244	                        stringResource(R.string.delete_post),
245	                        color = colors.reaction
246	                    )
247	                }
248	            },
249	            dismissButton = {
250	                TextButton(onClick = { showDeleteConfirmation = false }) {
251	                    Text(stringResource(R.string.cancel))
252	                }
253	            }
254	        )
255	    }
256	
257	    if (showShareConfirmation) {
258	        val hasShared = uiState.post?.viewerHasShared == true
259	        AlertDialog(
260	            onDismissRequest = { showShareConfirmation = false },
261	            title = {
262	                Text(stringResource(if (hasShared) R.string.unshare_confirm_title else R.string.share_confirm_title))
263	            },
264	            confirmButton = {
265	                TextButton(
266	                    onClick = {
267	                        showShareConfirmation = false
268	                        if (hasShared) viewModel.unsharePost() else viewModel.sharePost()
269	                    }
270	                ) {
271	                    Text(stringResource(if (hasShared) R.string.unshare_confirm_action else R.string.share_confirm_action))
272	                }
273	            },
274	            dismissButton = {
275	                TextButton(onClick = { showShareConfirmation = false }) {
276	                    Text(stringResource(R.string.cancel))
277	                }
278	            }
279	        )
280	    }
281	
282	    if (uiState.deleteError != null) {
283	        AlertDialog(
284	            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissDeleteError() },
285	            title = { Text(stringResource(R.string.action_error)) },
286	            text = { Text(uiState.deleteError ?: "") },
287	            confirmButton = {
288	                TextButton(onClick = { viewModel.dismissDeleteError() }) {
289	                    Text(stringResource(R.string.ok))
290	                }
291	            }
292	        )
293	    }
294	
295	    Scaffold(
296	        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
297	        topBar = {
298	            LargeTitleHeader(
299	                title = if (uiState.post?.typename == "Article") stringResource(R.string.article) else "Post",
300	                leadingContent = {
301	                    IconButton(onClick = onNavigateBack) {
302	                        Icon(
303	                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack,
304	                            contentDescription = "Back",
305	                            tint = colors.accent
306	                        )
307	                    }
308	                },
309	                trailingContent = if (uiState.canDelete) {
310	                    {
311	                        PostDetailActionMenu(
312	                            isDeleting = uiState.isDeleting,
313	                            onDelete = {
314	                                if (confirmBeforeDelete) {
315	                                    showDeleteConfirmation = true
316	                                } else {
317	                                    viewModel.deletePost()
318	                                }
319	                            }
320	                        )
321	                    }
322	                } else null
323	            )
324	        },
325	        floatingActionButton = {
326	            if (uiState.post != null && isLoggedIn) {
327	                FloatingActionButton(
328	                    onClick = { onReplyClick(postId) },
329	                    containerColor = colors.composeAccent,
330	                    contentColor = colors.composeOnAccent
331	                ) {
332	                    Icon(
333	                        imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.Reply,
334	                        contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.reply)
335	                    )
336	                }
337	            }
338	        }
339	    ) { paddingValues ->
340	        Box(
341	            modifier = Modifier
342	                .fillMaxSize()
343	                .padding(paddingValues)
344	        ) {
345	            val post = uiState.post
346	            PostDetailStateDispatch(
347	                post = post,
348	                isLoading = uiState.isLoading,
349	                error = uiState.error,
350	                onRetry = { viewModel.loadPost(postId) },
351	            ) { resolvedPost ->
352	                val replies = viewModel.replies.collectAsLazyPagingItems()
353	                PullToRefreshBox(
354	                    isRefreshing = uiState.isRefreshing,
355	                    onRefresh = {
356	                        viewModel.refresh()
357	                        replies.refresh()
358	                    }
359	                ) {
360	                    PostDetailContent(
361	                        post = resolvedPost,
362	                        reactionGroups = uiState.reactionGroups,
363	                        replies = replies,
364	                        onProfileClick = onProfileClick,
365	                        onPostClick = onPostClick,
366	                        onReplyClick = { onReplyClick(postId) },
367	                        onShareClick = {
368	                            if (confirmBeforeShare) {
369	                                showShareConfirmation = true
370	                            } else {
371	                                if (resolvedPost.viewerHasShared) {
372	                                    viewModel.unsharePost()
373	                                } else {
374	                                    viewModel.sharePost()
375	                                }
376	                            }
377	                        },
378	                        onReactionClick = { group -> viewModel.showReactorsSheet(group) },
379	                        onReactionPickerClick = { viewModel.toggleReactionPicker() },
380	                        onQuoteClick = { onQuoteClick(postId) },
381	                        onSharesClick = { viewModel.showSharesSheet() },
382	                        onQuotesClick = { viewModel.showQuotesSheet() },
383	                        onReactionsClick = { viewModel.showAllReactors() },
384	                        onExternalShareClick = {
385	                            val shareUrl = uiState.post?.url
386	                                ?: uiState.post?.iri
387	                            if (shareUrl != null) {
388	                                val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
389	                                    action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
390	                                    putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, shareUrl)
391	                                    type = "text/plain"
392	                                }
393	                                context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
394	                            }
395	                        },
396	                        onWebViewClick = { url -> webViewUrl = url }
397	                    )
398	                }
399	            }
400	        }
401	    }
402	}
403	
404	@Composable
405	private fun PostDetailActionMenu(
406	    isDeleting: Boolean,
407	    onDelete: () -> Unit
408	) {
409	    var expanded by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
410	    val colors = LocalAppColors.current
411	
412	    Box {
413	        IconButton(onClick = { expanded = true }) {
414	            Icon(
415	                imageVector = Icons.Filled.MoreVert,
416	                contentDescription = "More actions"
417	            )
418	        }
419	
420	        DropdownMenu(
421	            expanded = expanded,
422	            onDismissRequest = { expanded = false }
423	        ) {
424	            DropdownMenuItem(
425	                text = {
426	                    Text(
427	                        text = stringResource(R.string.delete_post),
428	                        color = colors.reaction
429	                    )
430	                },
431	                leadingIcon = {
432	                    Icon(
433	                        imageVector = Icons.Filled.Delete,
434	                        contentDescription = null,
435	                        tint = colors.reaction
436	                    )
437	                },
438	                onClick = {
439	                    expanded = false
440	                    onDelete()
441	                },
442	                enabled = !isDeleting
443	            )
444	        }
445	    }
446	}

449	@androidx.annotation.VisibleForTesting
450	internal fun PostDetailContent(
451	    post: Post,
452	    reactionGroups: List<ReactionGroup>,
453	    replies: LazyPagingItems<Post>,
454	    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
455	    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
456	    onShareClick: () -> Unit,
457	    onReplyClick: () -> Unit,
458	    onReactionClick: (ReactionGroup) -> Unit,
459	    onReactionPickerClick: () -> Unit,
460	    onQuoteClick: () -> Unit,
461	    onSharesClick: () -> Unit,
462	    onQuotesClick: () -> Unit,
463	    onReactionsClick: () -> Unit,
464	    onExternalShareClick: () -> Unit,
465	    onWebViewClick: (String) -> Unit = {},
466	) {
467	    val colors = LocalAppColors.current
468	    val typography = LocalAppTypography.current
469	    val context = LocalContext.current
470	    val scope = rememberCoroutineScope()
471	    val translationFailedText = stringResource(R.string.translation_failed)
472	
473	    var translatedContent by remember(post.id) { mutableStateOf<String?>(null) }
474	    var translationError by remember(post.id) { mutableStateOf<String?>(null) }
475	    var isTranslating by remember(post.id) { mutableStateOf(false) }
476	    var showTranslated by remember(post.id) { mutableStateOf(false) }
477	
478	    val dateFormatter = remember {
479	        DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("MMM d, yyyy 'at' h:mm a")
480	            .withZone(ZoneId.systemDefault())
481	    }
482	
483	    val navBarBottom = WindowInsets.navigationBars.asPaddingValues().calculateBottomPadding()
484	
485	    LazyColumn(

487	    ) {
488	        item {
489	            Column(
490	                modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)
491	            ) {
492	                // Reply target preview
493	                val replyTarget = post.replyTarget
494	                if (replyTarget != null) {
495	                    ReplyTargetPreview(
496	                        post = replyTarget,
497	                        onClick = { onPostClick(replyTarget.id) },
498	                        onProfileClick = onProfileClick
499	                    )
500	
501	                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
502	
503	                    Row(
504	                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
505	                        modifier = Modifier
506	                            .padding(vertical = 4.dp)

508	                    ) {
509	                        Icon(
510	                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.Reply,

514	                        )

518	                            style = typography.labelSmall,

520	                        )

523	                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
524	                    HorizontalDivider(color = colors.divider)
525	                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
526	                }
527	
528	                Row(
529	                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
530	                ) {
531	                    AsyncImage(
532	                        model = post.actor.avatarUrl,
533	                        contentDescription = null,
534	                        modifier = Modifier
535	                            .size(AppShapes.avatarTimeline)
536	                            .clip(CircleShape)
537	                            .clickable { onProfileClick(post.actor.handle) },
538	                        contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
539	                    )
540	
541	                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
542	
543	                    Column(
544	                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onProfileClick(post.actor.handle) }
545	                    ) {
546	                        pub.hackers.android.ui.components.RichDisplayName(
547	                            name = post.actor.name,
548	                            fallback = post.actor.handle,
549	                            style = typography.bodyLargeSemiBold,
550	                            color = colors.textPrimary
551	                        )
552	                        Text(
553	                            text = post.actor.handle,
554	                            style = typography.labelMedium,
555	                            color = colors.textSecondary
556	                        )
557	                    }
558	                }
559	
560	                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
561	
562	                val isArticle = post.typename == "Article"
563	
564	                post.name?.let { title ->

566	                        text = title,
567	                        style = if (isArticle) typography.titleLarge else typography.titleMedium,
568	                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
569	                        color = colors.textPrimary
570	                    )
571	                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(if (isArticle) 12.dp else 8.dp))
572	                    if (isArticle) {
573	                        HorizontalDivider(color = colors.divider)
574	                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
575	                    }
576	                }
577	
578	                val translatedText = translatedContent
579	                if (showTranslated && translatedText != null) {
580	                    Text(
581	                        text = translatedText,
582	                        style = typography.bodyLarge,
583	                        color = colors.textBody,
584	                        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
585	                    )
586	                } else {
587	                    HtmlContent(
588	                        html = post.content,
589	                        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
590	                        contentStyle = HtmlContentStyle.Prose,

593	                }
594	
595	                if (isTranslating) {

597	                        text = stringResource(R.string.translating),
598	                        style = typography.labelMedium,
599	                        color = colors.textSecondary,
600	                        modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 4.dp)
601	                    )
602	                }
603	
604	                val translationErrorText = translationError
605	                if (translationErrorText != null) {
606	                    Text(
607	                        text = translationErrorText,
608	                        style = typography.labelMedium,
609	                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error,
610	                        modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 4.dp)
611	                    )
612	                }
613	
614	                if (!isTranslating && translationError == null) {
615	                    Text(
616	                        text = if (showTranslated) stringResource(R.string.show_original) else stringResource(
617	                            R.string.translate
618	                        ),
619	                        style = typography.labelMedium,
620	                        color = colors.textSecondary,
621	                        modifier = Modifier
622	                            .padding(top = 4.dp)
623	                            .clickable {
624	                                if (showTranslated) {
625	                                    showTranslated = false
626	                                    return@clickable
627	                                }
628	                                translatedContent?.let {
629	                                    showTranslated = true
630	                                    return@clickable
631	                                }
632	                                val targetLanguageTag = androidx.core.os.ConfigurationCompat
633	                                    .getLocales(context.resources.configuration)
634	                                    .get(0)?.language ?: Locale.getDefault().language
635	                                scope.launch {
636	                                    isTranslating = true
637	                                    translationError = null
638	                                    try {
639	                                        val translated = translateDetailContent(
640	                                            html = post.content,
641	                                            targetLanguageTag = targetLanguageTag
642	                                        )
643	                                        translatedContent = translated
644	                                        showTranslated = true
645	                                    } catch (_: Exception) {
646	                                        translationError = translationFailedText
647	                                    } finally {
648	                                        isTranslating = false
649	                                    }
650	                                }
651	                            }
652	                    )
653	                }
654	
655	                if (post.media.isNotEmpty()) {

667	
668	                if (post.quotedPost != null) {
669	                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
670	                    QuotedPostPreview(

672	                        onClick = { onPostClick(post.quotedPost.id) },
673	                        onProfileClick = onProfileClick
674	                    )
675	                }
676	
677	                if (post.typename == "Article" && post.url != null) {
678	                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
679	                    OutlinedButton(
680	                        onClick = { onWebViewClick(post.url) },
681	                        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
682	                    ) {
683	                        Icon(
684	                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Outlined.OpenInNew,
685	                            contentDescription = null,
686	                            modifier = Modifier.size(18.dp)
687	                        )
688	                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
689	                        Text(stringResource(R.string.read_on_web))
690	                    }
691	                }
692	
693	                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
694	
695	                Row(
696	                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
697	                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
698	                ) {
699	                    Text(
700	                        text = dateFormatter.format(post.published),
701	                        style = typography.labelMedium,
702	                        color = colors.textSecondary
703	                    )
704	
705	                    if (post.visibility != pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.PUBLIC) {
706	                        Text(
707	                            text = "\u00B7",
708	                            style = typography.labelMedium,
709	                            color = colors.textSecondary
710	                        )
711	                        Icon(
712	                            imageVector = when (post.visibility) {
713	                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.UNLISTED -> Icons.Outlined.Lock
714	                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS -> Icons.Outlined.Group
715	                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.DIRECT -> Icons.Outlined.Lock
716	                                else -> Icons.Filled.Public
717	                            },
718	                            contentDescription = when (post.visibility) {
719	                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.UNLISTED -> "Unlisted"
720	                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS -> "Followers only"
721	                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.DIRECT -> "Direct"
722	                                else -> "Public"
723	                            },
724	                            modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp),
725	                            tint = colors.textSecondary
726	                        )
727	                    }
728	                }
729	
730	                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
731	
732	                Row(
733	                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
734	                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(16.dp)
735	                ) {
736	                    Text(
737	                        text = "${post.engagementStats.replies} ${stringResource(R.string.replies)}",
738	                        style = typography.labelMedium,
739	                        color = colors.textSecondary
740	                    )
741	                    Text(
742	                        text = "${post.engagementStats.shares} ${stringResource(R.string.shares)}",
743	                        style = typography.labelMedium,
744	                        color = colors.accent,
745	                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onSharesClick() }
746	                    )
747	                    Text(
748	                        text = "${post.engagementStats.reactions} ${stringResource(R.string.reactions)}",
749	                        style = typography.labelMedium,
750	                        color = colors.accent,
751	                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onReactionsClick() }
752	                    )
753	                    Text(
754	                        text = "${post.engagementStats.quotes} ${stringResource(R.string.quotes)}",
755	                        style = typography.labelMedium,
756	                        color = colors.accent,
757	                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onQuotesClick() }
758	                    )
759	                }
760	
761	                if (reactionGroups.isNotEmpty()) {
762	                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
763	                    Row {
764	                        reactionGroups.forEach { group ->

766	                                onClick = { onReactionClick(group) },

768	                                colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(

770	                                        colors.accent.copy(alpha = 0.2f)
771	                                    else
772	                                        colors.surface
773	                                ),
774	                                modifier = Modifier.padding(end = 8.dp)
775	                            ) {
776	                                Row(
777	                                    modifier = Modifier.padding(
778	                                        horizontal = 12.dp,
779	                                        vertical = 6.dp
780	                                    ),
781	                                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
782	                                ) {
783	                                    if (group.emoji != null) {
784	                                        Text(text = group.emoji)
785	                                    } else if (group.customEmoji != null) {
786	                                        AsyncImage(
787	                                            model = group.customEmoji.imageUrl,
788	                                            contentDescription = group.customEmoji.name,
789	                                            modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp)
790	                                        )
791	                                    }
792	                                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
793	                                    Text(
794	                                        text = group.count.toString(),
795	                                        style = typography.labelMedium,
796	                                        color = if (group.viewerHasReacted)
797	                                            colors.accent
798	                                        else
799	                                            colors.textPrimary
800	                                    )
801	                                }
802	                            }
803	                        }
804	                    }
805	                }
806	
807	                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
808	
809	                HorizontalDivider(color = colors.divider)
810	
811	                Row(
812	                    modifier = Modifier
813	                        .fillMaxWidth()
814	                        .padding(vertical = 4.dp),
815	                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceAround
816	                ) {
817	                    IconButton(onClick = onReplyClick) {
818	                        Icon(

821	                            tint = colors.textSecondary
822	                        )
823	                    }
824	                    IconButton(onClick = onShareClick) {
825	                        Icon(
826	                            imageVector = Icons.Filled.Repeat,
827	                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.share),
828	                            tint = if (post.viewerHasShared)
829	                                colors.share
830	                            else
831	                                colors.textSecondary
832	                        )
833	                    }
834	                    IconButton(onClick = onReactionPickerClick) {
835	                        Icon(
836	                            imageVector = Icons.Outlined.AddReaction,
837	                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.reactions),
838	                            tint = if (reactionGroups.any { it.viewerHasReacted })
839	                                colors.accent
840	                            else
841	                                colors.textSecondary
842	                        )
843	                    }
844	                    IconButton(onClick = onQuoteClick) {
845	                        Icon(
846	                            imageVector = Icons.Outlined.FormatQuote,
847	                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.quotes),
848	                            tint = colors.textSecondary
849	                        )
850	                    }
851	                    IconButton(onClick = onExternalShareClick) {
852	                        Icon(
853	                            imageVector = Icons.Outlined.Share,
854	                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.share),
855	                            tint = colors.textSecondary
856	                        )
857	                    }
858	                }
859	
860	                HorizontalDivider(color = colors.divider)
861	            }
862	        }
863	
864	        if (replies.itemCount > 0) {
865	            item {
866	                Text(
867	                    text = stringResource(R.string.replies),
868	                    style = typography.bodyLargeSemiBold,
869	                    color = colors.textPrimary,
870	                    modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)
871	                )
872	            }
873	
874	            items(
875	                count = replies.itemCount,
876	                key = replies.itemKey { it.id }
877	            ) { index ->
878	                val reply = replies[index] ?: return@items
879	                PostCard(
880	                    post = reply,
881	                    onClick = { onPostClick(reply.id) },
882	                    onProfileClick = onProfileClick,
883	                    onQuotedPostClick = onPostClick
884	                )
885	                HorizontalDivider(thickness = 0.5.dp, color = colors.divider)
886	            }
887	
888	            if (replies.loadState.append is LoadState.Loading) {
889	                item {
890	                    LoadingItem()
891	                }
892	            }
893	        }
894	    }
895	}

897	@Composable
898	private fun ReactorsSheet(
899	    groups: List<ReactionGroup>,
900	    initialIndex: Int,
901	    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit
902	) {
903	    val colors = LocalAppColors.current
904	    val typography = LocalAppTypography.current
905	    val safeInitial = initialIndex.coerceIn(0, (groups.size - 1).coerceAtLeast(0))
906	    var selectedIndex by remember(groups) { mutableIntStateOf(safeInitial) }
907	    val selectedGroup = groups.getOrNull(selectedIndex)
908	
909	    Column(
910	        modifier = Modifier
911	            .fillMaxWidth()
912	            .verticalScroll(rememberScrollState())
913	            .padding(16.dp)
914	    ) {
915	        Text(
916	            text = stringResource(R.string.reactors),
917	            style = typography.bodyLargeSemiBold,
918	            color = colors.textPrimary,
919	            modifier = Modifier.padding(bottom = 12.dp)
920	        )
921	
922	        if (groups.isEmpty() || selectedGroup == null) {
923	            Text(
924	                text = stringResource(R.string.no_reactors),
925	                style = typography.bodyMedium,
926	                color = colors.textSecondary,
927	                modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 24.dp)
928	            )
929	            return@Column
930	        }
931	
932	        Row(
933	            modifier = Modifier
934	                .fillMaxWidth()
935	                .horizontalScroll(rememberScrollState())
936	                .padding(bottom = 12.dp),
937	            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
938	        ) {
939	            groups.forEachIndexed { index, group ->
940	                val isSelected = index == selectedIndex
941	                Card(
942	                    onClick = { selectedIndex = index },
943	                    shape = RoundedCornerShape(AppShapes.reactionPillRadius),
944	                    colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
945	                        containerColor = if (isSelected)
946	                            colors.accent.copy(alpha = 0.2f)
947	                        else
948	                            colors.surface
949	                    )
950	                ) {
951	                    Row(
952	                        modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 6.dp),
953	                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
954	                    ) {
955	                        if (group.emoji != null) {
956	                            Text(text = group.emoji)
957	                        } else if (group.customEmoji != null) {
958	                            AsyncImage(
959	                                model = group.customEmoji.imageUrl,
960	                                contentDescription = group.customEmoji.name,
961	                                modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp)
962	                            )
963	                        }
964	                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
965	                        Text(
966	                            text = group.count.toString(),
967	                            style = typography.labelMedium,
968	                            color = if (isSelected) colors.accent else colors.textPrimary
969	                        )
970	                    }
971	                }
972	            }
973	        }
974	
975	        if (selectedGroup.reactors.isEmpty()) {
976	            Text(
977	                text = stringResource(R.string.no_reactors),
978	                style = typography.bodyMedium,
979	                color = colors.textSecondary,
980	                modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 24.dp)
981	            )
982	        } else {
983	            selectedGroup.reactors.forEach { actor ->
984	                Row(
985	                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
986	                    modifier = Modifier
987	                        .fillMaxWidth()
988	                        .clickable { onProfileClick(actor.handle) }
989	                        .padding(vertical = 8.dp)
990	                ) {
991	                    AsyncImage(
992	                        model = actor.avatarUrl,
993	                        contentDescription = null,
994	                        modifier = Modifier
995	                            .size(40.dp)
996	                            .clip(CircleShape),
997	                        contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
998	                    )
999	                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
1000	                    Column {
1001	                        pub.hackers.android.ui.components.RichDisplayName(
1002	                            name = actor.name,
1003	                            fallback = actor.handle,
1004	                            style = typography.bodyMedium.copy(fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold),
1005	                            color = colors.textPrimary
1006	                        )
1007	                        Text(
1008	                            text = actor.handle,
1009	                            style = typography.labelMedium,
1010	                            color = colors.textSecondary
1011	                        )
1012	                    }
1013	                }
1014	            }
1015	        }
1016	    }
1017	}

1094	@Composable
1095	private fun QuotesSheet(
1096	    posts: List<Post>,
1097	    isLoading: Boolean,
1098	    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
1099	    onClose: () -> Unit
1100	) {
1101	    val colors = LocalAppColors.current
1102	    val typography = LocalAppTypography.current
1103	
1104	    Column(
1105	        modifier = Modifier
1106	            .fillMaxWidth()
1107	            .padding(16.dp)
1108	    ) {
1109	        Text(
1110	            text = stringResource(R.string.quotes),
1111	            style = typography.bodyLargeSemiBold,
1112	            color = colors.textPrimary,
1113	            modifier = Modifier.padding(bottom = 16.dp)
1114	        )
1115	
1116	        if (isLoading) {
1117	            Box(
1118	                modifier = Modifier
1119	                    .fillMaxWidth()
1120	                    .height(100.dp),
1121	                contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
1122	            ) {
